sglang.title: support set role as 'tool'
sglang.author: yukavio
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
support set role as 'tool' in chat-template
Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

sglang.title: feat: update torch 2.5.1
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

sglang.title: Rename layer_idx to layer_id for consistency
sglang.author: janimo
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Use the same argument name as the rest of the models.

sglang.title: Fix chunked prefill with output logprob
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Chunked prefill was disabled if the logprob is requested. However, if we only want output logprob, we can still do chunked prefill. This PR fixes it.

sglang.title: Allow passing extra request body to bench_offline_throughput.py
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Usage example with regex:
python3 -m sglang.bench_offline_throughput --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --dataset-name random --num-p 1 --random-input 32 --random-output 512 --random-range 1 --extra '{"regex": "\\d+"}'

sglang.title: Simplify logits penalizer
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Improve some inefficient code
Improve the code style

vllm.title: [VLM] Report multi_modal_placeholders in output
vllm.author: lk-chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Report multi_modal_placeholders in output
This helps inspect VLM model performance, e.g. distinguish text tokens and multi-modal embeddings.
related: #8346

vllm.title: [Model] Remove redundant  softmax when using PoolingType.STEP
vllm.author: Maybewuss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Whether to enable softmax can be controlled by the softmax parameter when initializing Pooler.

https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/vllm/model_executor/layers/pooler.py#L143

The softmax here is unnecessary.

vllm.title: [Model][LoRA]LoRA support added for glm-4v
vllm.author: linitra24
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To facilitate Lora support, the language model and VL model have been separated. I tested it locally, but it seems I encountered the same issue as this Comment, where the results from vllm differ slightly from those of transformers. However, there is no issue with loading the Lora model, and the res

vllm.title: [Model] Remove transformers attention porting in VITs
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In #8061, we added fallback to transformers SDPA ViT attention implementation for CPU backend.
However, since CPU backend has supported tensor parallel in #6125, it isn't compatible with CPU TP.
Moreover, since we have planned to consolidate ViT attention backend, the separated SDPA and xformers imp

vllm.title: [Doc] Update doc for LoRA support in GLM-4V
vllm.author: linitra24
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since #10418 added LoRA support for the GLM-4V, the Supported Models page needs to be updated accordingly.
ping @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [5/N][torch.compile] torch.jit.script --> torch.compile
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fixes #8536
and I also observe performance gain:
python benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --input-len 1024 --output-len 256 --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B -tp 2 --load-format dummy

main branch: 
Throughput: 17.91 requests/s, 22928.01 total tokens/s, 4585.60 output tokens/s

this pr:
Throughput: 1

vllm.title: [Doc] Add documentation for Structured Outputs
vllm.author: ismael-dm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adding some documentation on the structured outputs (guided decoding) options that are available, together with two files of examples. Includes both online inference (OpenAI API) and offline inference.

vllm.title: Fix open_collective value in FUNDING.yml
vllm.author: andrew
vllm.bodyExcerpt: GitHub only supports arrays for github and custom values in funding.yml files (docs: https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/displaying-a-sponsor-button-in-your-repository)

vllm.title: [Model][Bugfix] Support TP for PixtralHF ViT
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently running a PixtralHF model with TP will cause an input shape error while profiling through ViT attention:
RuntimeError: Error in model execution (input dumped to /tmp/err_execute_model_input_20241117-211655.pkl): shape '[1, 20480, 16, 64]' is invalid for input of size 5242880

Verified with

vllm.title: [Hardware][XPU] AWQ/GPTQ support for xpu backend
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add AWQ/GPTQ support for xpu backend.
BEFORE SUBMITTING, PLEASE READ THE CHECKLIST BELOW AND FILL IN THE DESCRIPTION ABOVE



 PR Checklist (Click to Expand) 
Thank you for your contribution to vLLM! Before submitting the pull request, please ensure the PR meets the following criteria. This helps vL

vllm.title: [Kernel] Explicitly specify other value in tl.load calls
vllm.author: angusYuhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: According to Triton's user documentation, using a mask with tl.load will not load the data specified by the mask. If other is not specified, there is no guarantee that the values affected by the mask will be valid (could be nan in theory). It would be a good idea to explicitly specify the other valu

vllm.title: [Kernel] Initial Machete W4A8 support + Refactors
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
add machete kernel support for QQQ style w4a8 quantization (including fp8 activations)
refactor machete dispatching logic
refactor machete file generation
reduce the number of prepack kernels generated (e.g. don't need separate kernels for uint4b8 and uint4 since we are just shuffling data around)

vllm.title: [3/N][torch.compile] consolidate custom op logging
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
previously the custom op logging is too verbose.
after #10383 , we now have global control and aggregation of the custom op statistics.

vllm.title: [misc] Allow partial prefix benchmarking & random input generation for prefix benchmarking
vllm.author: rickyyx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR

Allows a random generation for prompts when testing prefix caching
Allows controlling exact ratio of prefix sharing among requests (rather than fully cached requests like before)

vllm.title: [ci/build] Have dependabot ignore all patch update
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have too many dependencies and all patch updates can be a little noisy. This is to have dependabot ignore all patch version updates.

vllm.title: [Bugfix]Fix Phi-3 BNB online quantization
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #9937
Work



Fix Phi-3 BNB config




For current models like Phi-3,Baichuan, ChaGLM, there is a bug in BNB quantization. This is because their merged linear( mlp )weights are already merged in the disk, and the current BNB implementation doesn't account for this scenario,fix this

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Guard for negative counter metrics to prevent crash
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I'm not sure how it happens, but we have observed crashes when running vLLM in online model due to a negative value being sent to increment a Prometheus counter:
ERROR 11-15 03:59:17 engine.py:165] ValueError('Error in model execution: Counters can only be incremented by non-negative amounts.')
ERRO
